code:
import io
import string

let t_line = io.read_line()
let t = match t_line
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let body = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(body)

mut count = 0
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(body, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(body, start, i)
      if tok == t
        count = count + 1
      end
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if start < n
  let tok = string.substring(body, start, n)
  if tok == t
    count = count + 1
  end
end

println("count=#{count}")
